sections.paragraph: m. the south, the southern quarter, Exo 27:9 Isa 21:1, etc. גְּבוּל נֶגֶב the southern boundary, Jos 15:4. In acc. adv. נֶגֶב כִּנֲּרֹות to the south of the lake Cinneroth. Jos 11:2. Hence אֶרֶץ הַנֶּגֶב Jos 15:19, and simply נֶגֶב Psa 126:4, south country; specially-(a) the southern district of Palestine, Gen 13:3 20:1 24:62 Deu 34:3 Jos 10:40.-(b) Egypt, Isa 30:6 Dan 11:5, seq.-With ־ָה parag. נֶגְבָּה southward, Exo 40:24 followed by לְ Jos 17:9, 10 Jos 17:10, נֶגְבָּה לְאֶפְרַיִם “southward (it was) Ephraim’s;” and מִן Jos 18:14, נֶגְבָּה מִן הָהָר “southward of the mountain.” Also with pref. בַּנֶּגְבָּה Jos 15:21, “in (the region lying) towards the south,” and לַנֶּגְבָּה 1Ch 26:17. Compare צָפֹון.
